title: chamaecrista ulmea
intro: Chamaecrista ulmea, also known as sensitive plant or touch-me-not, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and Asia, and is widely cultivated for its medicinal properties. Chamaecrista ulmea contains various compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
